{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201455336BFCDCD6ADC7013DF45F"}"},"total":116},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7475003934468817726","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"穿越反套路！贱痞修仙笑炸，骚操作骚话不断。沙雕中藏热血魂，修仙日常笑泪齐飞根本停不下来！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740416298,"group_id":"7471437902082231320","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1864367631245463"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471437902082231320","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3673,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7474066912726860606","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节紧凑，角色鲜活，文笔细腻如画。设定新颖，伏笔绝妙，读完仍回味！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740196403,"group_id":"7471437902082231320","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大帅比一个","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DkV3C95X7BmWO456xPYnbjxEJ2o5VpTSggaYK5DjRv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/e0c133bb569c4733a66fe8b1f624f273~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531699&x-signature=E5xzbIzvW3k9iKC904tjT4OO2u0%3D","user_id":"1864367631245463","user_name":"正在缓冲。。。。。。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1864367631245463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471437902082231320","book_info":{"abstract":"【又名：长生仙界一杂修】
【长生+非爽文+无系统+轻幽默+日常+稳健（发疯除外）+慢热】
来到修仙界，一心想长生，顺便广学天下之法，坐天边赴宴。
可自从加入正气宗，君凌轩就发这是一个现画风清奇的宗门！
抠门宗主，闭关数百年，唯有记仇名声在外！
大师姐外号女魔头！
二师兄采花贼！三师姐冷面杀手！四师兄街溜子！
君凌轩足不出宗就能感受到什么是死里求生，例如诈骗，试药，打广告。
聪明加上高悟性，让君凌轩看遍仙凡世态炎凉。
终临在那日大道崩塌，末法动乱，万物生灵之时......
君凌轩只身与祸首对立！
【你是......】
“我？”
“我就一杂修！”
